n: A Gilded Veneer, Part 7: Lashêm's Request

steps.t: Lashêm's parcels were misplaced by a number of smugglers operating out of Sâl Bajat, and he needs you to recover them and teach the miscreants he will…
Lashêm is waiting for you to deliver his misplaced parcels to him at Kheb Hanût, in Tâkhdar.
